creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 29 Jul 2011 10:50, "Uffe Jakobsen" <uffe@uffe.org> wrote:
>
> The following reply was made to PR ports/158403; it has been noted by
GNATS.
>
> From: Uffe Jakobsen <uffe@uffe.org>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: ports/158403: New port:
mail/dovecot2-deleted-to-trash-plugin:
>  dovecot 2.x plugin for moving deleted mails into trash
> Date: Fri, 29 Jul 2011 11:45:57 +0200
>
>  Thanks for your comments to my port
>
>  I'll look into this when I'm back from vacation in a few days - thanks
>
>  /Uffe

Thanks for your response Uffe. I'm going on honeymoon Monday, so it may have
to wait until the following Monday, but I'll sort it as quickly as possible.

Enjoy the rest of your vacation!

Chris
